result.reason: To enhance configuration management by enabling users to merge multiple configuration files and automatically export changes, improving collaboration and data integrity.
result.approach: Implement new services for merging configurations, utilizing XmlConnectionsDeserializer to read multiple sources. For auto-export, create a mechanism to periodically save changes via XmlConnectionsSaver, potentially triggered by UI events or a background timer. New UI elements in FrmOptions will be needed to configure these features.
